verses.text: Surely the human is indeed in (a state of) loss

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
verses.text: – except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, and exhort (each other) in truth, and exhort (each other) in patience.
